tasks.prompt: Check alphaXiv and arXiv for new research papers on the baby universe theory in quantum cosmology, specifically looking for new validations, mathematical sophistication, or observational signals. Update the baseline findings at `outputs/baby-universe-quantum-cosmology-baseline.md` based on what you find.

Scan arXiv (quant-ph, gr-qc) and recent journals for new papers on the Many-Worlds Interpretation (Everettian mechanics) in quantum mechanics and quantum cosmology. Focus on theoretical advancements in probability, decoherence, and cosmic applications. Update the outputs/many-worlds-quantum-cosmology-baseline.md file with the new findings.
